config.user_description: Build a fake Kanban ticketing system for the Claude Code training software factory. Columns: To Do, In Progress, On Hold, Done. Copy and adapt the existing agent-tasks API (retrieve, mark done/skipped) to tickets, but with more states and more methods because Claude Code can ask a question (old GitHub 'Input needed' / 'Refinement needed' flow, renamed 'Ready for AI').

discovery.test_command: cd backend && npx playwright test ; cd frontend && npx ng test --configuration=ci
